untranslatable_reason: This is a trade frequency/selection filter, not a position sizing rule. It describes *which trades to take* (expectancy > 2.0R, R-multiple ≥ 3R, max 20 trades/year) to preserve capital for high-quality opportunities. These are entry quality thresholds and trade count limits, not methods for determining position size (dollars, %, or contracts) once a trade is selected. Position sizing rules define HOW MUCH to risk per trade; this rule defines WHICH trades qualify.
